Package de.uka.ilkd.key.settings

Class AbstractPropertiesSettings

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractSettings
de.uka.ilkd.key.settings.AbstractPropertiesSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Settings
Direct Known Subclasses:
ColorSettings, ExtensionSettings, KeyStrokeSettings, ProofCachingSettings, SlicingSettings, ViewSettings
public abstract class AbstractPropertiesSettings extends AbstractSettings
A base class for own settings based on properties.

      protected final Properties properties
      Properties stored in this settings object. Updated by each AbstractPropertiesSettings.PropertyEntry when a new non-null value is set.

      public void writeSettings(Properties props)
      Description copied from interface: Settings
      The settings to store are written to the given Properties object.
